summary: Authored juggler/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md: first living per-service requirements register with R1–R17, acceptance criteria, code+test traceability, 3 use cases, traceability summary.

findings.claim: R6 (time tracking) is partial: time_remaining+WIP status exist but dedicated clock-in/clock-out endpoints and actual-vs-estimated reporting are not implemented
findings.evidence: juggler/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md:R6 — grepped codebase for actual_dur, clock_in, clock_out, timer_start, logTime; none found. time_remaining field exists in DB schema (20260301000000_initial_schema.js:26).
findings.fix: Track clock-in/clock-out as planned backlog item; no doc fix needed.

findings.claim: R9 (drag-and-drop scheduling) is partial: handleGridDrop implemented in AppLayout.jsx but no unit test for the drop handler logic
findings.evidence: juggler/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md:R9 — CalendarGrid.jsx:366 + AppLayout.jsx handleGridDrop found; no corresponding test file covers drop scheduling logic.
findings.fix: REFER→telly: add unit test for handleGridDrop scheduling handler.

findings.claim: R17 (MCP server) is partial: 20 tools implemented but no dedicated MCP-layer per-client isolation test
findings.evidence: juggler/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md:R17 — juggler-mcp/index.js has 20 server.tool registrations; no test file found under juggler-mcp/ covering MCP-layer user-isolation.
findings.fix: REFER→telly: add MCP per-client auth isolation test.

findings.claim: R12, R13, R14 (time reports, burn-down, capacity planning) are planned with no code or tests — correctly documented
findings.evidence: juggler/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md:R12-R14 — grepped all route files, frontend src for report/burndown/capacity-planning; none found.

refers.why: verify juggler/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md against BASE-DOCUMENTATION-RUBRIC §0 requirements row and BASE-REQUIREMENTS-STANDARD §9 structure
R9 drag-and-drop handler and R17 MCP per-client isolation have no unit tests — coverage gaps identified during requirements authoring
